description: License policy for dependency compliance - defines allowed, flagged, and blocked licenses

rationale.allowed: Permissive licenses compatible with commercial and non-commercial use
rationale.flagged_for_review: Copyleft licenses requiring legal review for compliance - may be acceptable depending on usage
rationale.blocked: Licenses incompatible with project requirements - SSPL and Commons Clause restrict commercial use, BUSL has time-based restrictions
rationale.dual_licensed_acceptable: Dual-licensed packages (e.g., MIT OR GPL-2.0) are acceptable if at least one license is allowed
